hero.line2: with intent, systems, and business sense.
hero.lead: UX/UI, cross-functional leadership, and technical execution—from strategy to pixels, without losing sight of metrics.
hero.clients: Compensar · Scotiabank Colpatria · ADL Digital Lab

about.title: The problem matters more than the interface.
about.body:
I’ve spent 6+ years designing digital products—and what interests me most isn’t the interface, but the problem behind it.

I’ve worked at Compensar, Scotiabank Colpatria, and ADL Digital Lab, across fintech, health, real estate, and services.

My approach connects product vision, multidisciplinary leadership, and technical execution—including design systems and front-end development.

I understand technical constraints, speak the language of business, and make UX decisions oriented to metrics, experience, and product growth.

experience.title: Impact on critical, regulated products.
experience.subtitle: A path where design is measured by clarity, trust, and team velocity.

projects.title: A curated selection of recent projects.
projects.subtitle: Three pieces with deeper narrative and visual exploration—ready for recruiter and product-team review.
projects.moreSubtitle: Additional explorations across health, property, and education.

approach.title: Design as a decision system.
approach.body:
I work with clear hypotheses, evidence, and shared success criteria. I build visual and interaction systems that enable fast iteration without sacrificing accessibility or consistency.

I integrate AI as an accelerator—not a replacement—for research, variants, documentation, and visual QA, always with human review and product judgment.

My leadership shows up as less rework: early alignment with business and engineering, crisp handoff, and narrative that sells the decision—not just the screen.
